For 3 rooms.Book room 1&2 and room 4 | Like your own home, 24hrs access. | I have 3 bedrooms in a charming British style townhouse for you and your family while you are visiting Singapore . This is the GREEN ROOM .

Be sure to look at the other 2 rooms .

BURGUNDY ROOM(https://www.airbnb.co.uk/rooms/369141 )
BLUE ROOM (https://www.airbnb.co.uk/rooms/369145)

Hi My name is Belinda -Housekeeper 

I would like to welcome you to my "Homestay Website" 


Accomodation for: 

- an extended stay for studies, min 3 months
- business,
- training in singapore
 

Room rental are available for min 3month or longer .Room rental depending on the choice of a common sharing room (family suite) ,a standard room,a deluxe room or a triplet room which varies in sizes. We hope to give you a warm home feeling here with sweet dreams. Please forgive us if we cannot meet your  high expectations.We will try our best to make your stay as comfortable as a homestay.

Regards
Belinda | Hello !
I am Elizabeth from Singapore.

Looking forward to hosting you in our lovely little sunny island. | I like travelling a lot, as well as good food. 

Singapore is not only a place for the future, but has an incredible rich history, which I think people should know about. Contact me if you have any questions!
